jd_text: Chief Financial Officer (CFO) 📍 Saudi Arabia | Full-Time | Managing Director Level The Opportunity We are seeking an experienced and strategic Chief Financial Officer (CFO) to lead the finance function of a dynamic and fast-growing DIGITAL financial institution in Saudi Arabia. This is a critical executive role reporting directly to the CEO, responsible for shaping financial strategy, ensuring robust financial governance, and driving sustainable growth across the organization. Key Responsibilities Financial Strategy & Leadership Lead the development and execution of the organisation’s financial strategy aligned with long-term business objectives Provide strategic insights to the CEO, Board, and senior leadership on financial performance and growth opportunities Own and manage the full P&L, ensuring strong financial discipline and performance Financial Planning, Budgeting & Reporting Oversee financial planning, forecasting, and budgeting processes (short- and long-term) Ensure accurate, timely, and compliant financial reporting (monthly, quarterly, annual) Develop and monitor key financial performance metrics and dashboards Treasury & Investment Oversight Oversee treasury operations, liquidity management, and funding strategy Develop contingency funding plans in collaboration with treasury leadership Review and recommend investment strategies and portfolio performance Accounting, Controls & Compliance Ensure robust financial controls, accounting policies, and reporting frameworks Oversee general accounting, including AP/AR, payroll, and reconciliations Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements, including zakat and tax obligations Maintain strong governance and audit-ready financial processes Operational Oversight Approve key financial transactions, reports, and policies Oversee financial systems, reporting capabilities, and data governance Drive continuous improvement in financial processes and efficiency Stakeholder Management Engage with Board members, senior management, and regulatory stakeholders Present financial performance, forecasts, and strategic recommendations Build strong relationships across the organisation to support decision-making About You Experience & Qualifications: MUST BE A SAUDI NATIONAL Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or related discipline Minimum 15+ years of finance experience , with at least 5 years in a senior leadership role within banking, financial services, or fintech Strong experience in financial strategy, treasury, budgeting, and reporting Deep understanding of P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow management Proven ability to lead and develop high-performing finance teams Skills & Competencies: Strong leadership and strategic thinking capability Excellent analytical and decision-making skills High level of integrity, professionalism, and accountability Strong communication and stakeholder management skills Ability to operate effectively in a fast-paced, evolving environment What Sets You Apart Demonstrated agility, sound judgment, and a forward-thinking mindset A collaborative and humble leadership style Strong focus on delivering value and sustainable outcomes Ability to balance strategic vision with operational execution Why Apply? Executive leadership role with direct CEO exposure Ownership of the organisation’s financial strategy and performance Opportunity to shape and build a high-impact finance function Work within a progressive and growth-oriented financial environment Additional Requirement Must meet SAMA “Fit and Proper” criteria for senior appointments
